name: hashing
summary: One-way function: data → fixed-size digest. SHA-256, bcrypt, argon2. Khác với encryption (irreversible).

facts.text: SHA-256: 256-bit hash. Không dùng cho passwords
bcrypt: adaptive, intentionally slow — cho passwords
argon2id: winner Password Hashing Competition, memory-hard
collision resistance: khó tìm 2 inputs cùng hash

danger: plain hash cho passwords: rainbow table
